rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Implementation-level signal routing should be expressed through assignments within the implementation annex
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports belong in component type scopes
Subcomponent ports should not be referenced in component type contracts unless represented via valid variables or outputs
AGREE annex content must align with the authoritative AADL model structure
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings require placement in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assignments in component type annexes
Avoid referencing subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without proper variable representation
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
